events.description: World/Fog/Minimap deep-dive. 2 critical bugs: F-1 MinimapClickProxy missing braces (right-click also snaps camera, live in production), F-2 MusicManager menu-music-in-game (CONFIRMS MB-30). Plus DayNightCycle Texture/Mesh leaks. Surface-scan verification: 5/9 confirmed (55% TPR), 4 refuted (PassabilityGrid race / FloatingHealthBars predicate / FogOfWarSystem NRE / FoW Reinitialize). Cumulative across 8 deep-dives: ~95 verified findings, ~30 critical/high.
